add_choice_text:
Choose how you want to add a bot:

{e_bug} Create New Bot — Telegram opens its bot creation screen. Once you confirm, everything is set up automatically — no token needed.

{e_lightning} Add Existing Bot — You already have a bot on BotFather and just want to connect it here.
add_token_hint: You can paste just the token or the entire message from BotFather — I'll find it automatically.
add_token_step3: Follow the steps — pick a name and a username
add_token_step4: Copy the token BotFather gives you
add_token_subtitle: Please paste your bot token from @BotFather.
bot_limit_body: You have {current}/{max} bots on your {tier} plan.
confirm_delete: Delete Bot? Are you sure you want to delete @{username}? This will permanently delete: • All subscribers ({subscribers}) • All button menus • All forms and responses • All broadcast history This cannot be undone.
created_success_v3:
{e_party} {name} is live! Username: @{username} Link: t.me/{username}
Send your bot /start to test it. Use the Admin Panel to add menus, forms, and broadcasts.
desc_too_long_chars_msg: {e_cancel} Description too long ({length}/{max}). Please shorten it.
name_too_long_chars_msg: {e_cancel} Name too long ({length}/{max} chars). Please shorten it.
no_bots_message: You don't have any bots yet. Tap Add New Bot below to create your first bot. Telegram will open its creation screen and once you confirm, everything is set up automatically — no token needed!
profile_commands_prompt:
Send your command list, one per line:
command - Short description
Example: start - Show the main menu help - Get support stop - Unsubscribe No leading slash needed — Telegram adds it automatically. Commands must use lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores only.
profile_desc_prompt: Send the new description for your bot. It appears on the bot's Telegram profile screen — subscribers see it before they start a conversation.
profile_name_prompt: Send the new display name for your bot.
profile_photo_download_failed: Could not download the photo. Please try again.
profile_photo_prompt: Send a photo to use as your bot's profile picture.
profile_photo_upload_failed: Could not update the profile photo. Please try again.
revoke_warning: Generates a new API token and disconnects the old one. Your subscribers and all data are NOT affected — only the bot's connection to Telegram changes. What stays the same: All subscribers, menus, forms, broadcasts, and analytics are unaffected. The old token stops working immediately. If any external service uses it, update them after revoking. The bot will restart automatically.
select_prompt: Tap any bot below to open its control panel.
setup_progress: Setting up webhook and configuring bot...
token_revoke_no_tid_toast: ❌ Cannot revoke — bot Telegram ID not recorded.
token_rotation_failed: {e_cancel} Token rotation failed. Telegram error: {error} Your bot is still running with the old token.
token_rotation_managed_only_toast: ⚠️ Token rotation is only available for managed bots.
token_webhook_failed: {e_warning} Token rotated but webhook registration failed. The new token is saved. Tap {e_webhook} Refresh Setup to retry the webhook.
webhook_failed_alert: ❌ Webhook refresh failed. Check bot token.
webhook_issue: Note: Webhook setup had issues. The bot may need reconfiguration.
